heading: Inspection by legally constituted law enforcement agencies
label: 2147 Inspection by legally constituted law enforcement agencies
text: The Secretary shall promulgate rules and regulations requiring dealers, exhibitors, research facilities, and operators of auction sales subject to to permit inspection of their animals and records at reasonable hours upon request by legally constituted law enforcement agencies in search of lost animals.section 2142 of this title
notes: Amendments1970— substituted “promulgate rules and regulations requiring dealers, exhibitors, research facilities, and operators of auction sales subject to ” for “issue rules and regulations requiring licensed dealers and research facilities”.Pub. L. 91–579section 2142 of this title
